key_papers.insight: DRL algorithms with risk-adjusted objectives for dynamic asset allocation

incremental_strategies.name: Regime-Switching Momentum
incremental_strategies.logic: Use sparse jump model or volatility regime to switch between momentum and mean-reversion signals

incremental_strategies.name: Overnight-Long + Daytime-Reversal Hybrid
incremental_strategies.logic: Decompose returns into overnight + daytime; long strong overnight, reverse daytime
incremental_strategies.note: Requires intraday decomposition; approximable with open/close delta

incremental_strategies.name: Low-Volatility with Regime Filter
incremental_strategies.logic: Apply low-vol signal only in low-vol regimes; switch to momentum in high-vol

incremental_strategies.name: Sentiment-Conditional Multi-Factor
incremental_strategies.logic: 30 cross-sectional anomalies conditioned on investor sentiment (A-share validated)

incremental_strategies.name: Ensemble Feature-Importance Weighted Blend
incremental_strategies.logic: Use ML ensemble feature importance to dynamically weight factor blend

incremental_metrics.name: Max Drawdown Recovery Time
incremental_metrics.formula: days from trough to new high

incremental_metrics.name: Factor Decay Half-Life
incremental_metrics.formula: lag where IC drops to half of IC_1
